Footer.title: Shall we build something together?
Footer.desc: I'm always learning, exploring new technologies, and looking for projects where I can bring real value. If you have an idea, a team, or a challenge, I'd love to hear from you.

hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer & UX/UI Designer. I build scalable, intuitive digital products with real impact.

ux.title: UX/UI Focus
ux.desc: Every line of code I write has the user in mind. I design intuitive, accessible, and efficient interfaces that solve real problems.

pressure.title: Problem-solving Under Pressure
pressure.desc: 7 years in international kitchens trained me to make quick decisions, prioritize, and deliver results when it matters most.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Vision
fullstack.desc: From wireframe to deploy. I handle the entire product lifecycle: design, frontend, backend, databases, and infrastructure.

about.p1: I'm Nicolás Ariel Fernández, a Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience building web applications with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and Node.js. I'm currently pursuing a diploma in UX/UI Design, which allows me to create products that don't just work well — they feel right.
about.p2: But my story doesn't start with code. For 7 years I worked as a professional chef in New Zealand, Sweden, Germany, and Australia. High-pressure kitchens taught me something no bootcamp can: solving problems in real time, communicating across cultures, and staying calm when everything's on fire (literally and figuratively).
about.p3: That unconventional combination — culinary discipline + technical thinking + design empathy — is what makes me different. I don't just write clean code; I understand the user, the business, and the team.

card1.title: 3+ years in web development
card1.desc: React, Node.js, TypeScript, NestJS and more.

card3.title: From the kitchen to code
card3.desc: Problem-solving under pressure, attention to detail, teamwork.

Portfolio.title: Projects
Portfolio.subtitle: A selection of projects where I combine technical development with user-centered design.

project1.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
project1.desc: Admin panel for an online store with real-time metrics, product management, and sales analytics.

project2.title: Task Management App
project2.desc: Task management application with drag & drop, real-time collaboration, and smart notifications.

project3.title: Restaurant Booking System
project3.desc: Online booking system for restaurants with interactive calendar, table management, and automatic confirmations.

project4.title: Portfolio & Blog
project4.desc: Personal site with integrated blog, dynamic content system, and advanced SEO optimization.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.desc: Do you have any questions, proposals, or just want to say hi? Leave me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.title: Shall we build something together?
footer.desc: I'm always learning, exploring new technologies, and looking for projects where I can bring real value. If you have an idea, a team, or a challenge, I'd love to hear from you.
